name: MDN: ARIA treegrid role
notes: Documents treegrid as a combination of tree and grid roles with rows, columns, gridcells, expandable parent rows, aria-expanded rules, aria-level, aria-posinset, aria-setsize, managed focus, aria-rowcount, aria-colcount, row and column indices, accessible naming, aria-activedescendant alternatives, sorting, menus, and readonly behavior.
